name: dinagat-pass
description: Standalone Dinagat Pass monorepo. Destination Economy Operating System for Dinagat Islands.

scripts.doctrine: echo "Dinagat Pass is standalone. OSP is architectural reference only."
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/backend typecheck && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/web typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/shared build && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/backend build && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/shared lint && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/backend lint && pnpm --filter @dinagat-pass/web lint
